subcodes.first_line: O Kazim! The oppressor seeketh to extinguish the Fire of God with the waters of malice and hatred. Thus hath his soul enticed him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کاظم ان الظالم اراد ان یخمد نار الله بماء الضغینه و البغضاء کذلک سولت له
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @high station of the true believer, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
